sections.heading: PROTOLABS NETWORK - MANUFACTURING STANDARDS
sections.text: PROTOLABS NETWORK - MANUFACTURING STANDARDS Last updated: 12 Jan 2024 Version: 2.1 A detailed description of our manufacturing capabilities can be found in our capabilities PDF. Any order placed should take the following manufacturing limitations in mind, unless otherwise agreed between the parties under specific circumstances.

sections.heading: 3D printing
sections.text: 3D printing All surfaces will have a consistent visual appearance. FDM and SLA parts will have the support structures removed and will be cleaned of all excess support/build material. All parts will be cleaned and have excess powders and materials removed. The acceptable accuracy of parts varies by technology and is stated as: Material Dimensional accuracy Prototyping FDM: Â± 0.5% with a lower limit of Â± 0.5 mm (Â± 0.02") Industrial FDM: Â± 0.3% with a lower limit: Â± 0.3 mm (Â±0.012" in) Prototyping SLA/DLP: Â± 0.3% with a lower limit of Â± 0.3 mm (Â± 0.012") SLS/MJF: Â± 0.3% with a lower limit of Â± 0.3 mm (Â± 0.012") Industrial SLA: Â± 0.2% with a lower limit of Â± 0.13 mm (Â± 0.005") Y...

sections.heading: CNC machining
sections.text: CNC machining We offer CNC milling and CNC turning services . If not otherwise specified on the technical drawing, all parts will be machined to ISO 2768 tolerance standards: Limits for nominal size Plastics (ISO 2768- m) Metals (ISO 2768- f) 0.5mm* to 3mm Â±0.1mm Â±0.05mm Over 3mm to 6mm Â±0.1mm Â±0.05mm Over 6mm to 30mm Â±0.2mm Â±0.1mm Over 30mm to 120mm Â±0.3mm Â±0.15mm Over 120mm to 400mm Â±0.5mm Â±0.2mm Over 400mm to 1000mm Â±0.8mm Â±0.3mm Over 1000mm to 2000mm Â±1.2mm Â±0.5mm Over 2000mm to 4000mm Â±2mm *Customers are asked to clearly indicate tolerances for nominal sizes below 0.5mm on their technical drawings. Standard order surface finish shall be referred to as âas machinedâ a...

sections.heading: Injection molding
sections.text: Injection molding Standard core & cavity surface finish will have minimal machining marks and will be smoothed to the manufacturerâs discretion. In case a different finish is required, this must be specified clearly in the form of an SPI finishing standard. Part shrinkage will be determined by the manufacturer and the molds will be CNC machined to standard tolerances of Â± 0.125 mm (Â± 0.005") after adjusting for part shrinkage. Unless otherwise noted, standard tolerance of Â± 0.250 mm (0.010") will be held for each manufactured part. Part-to-part repeatability will typically be < 0.100 mm (0.004"). Any tolerances tighter than Â± 0.125 mm (Â± 0.005") will be a best effort. Protolabs Netwo...

sections.heading: Sheet metal fabrication
sections.text: Sheet metal fabrication We offer laser cutting and bending , with our sheet metal fabrication service , with a variety of materials including aluminum, stainless steel, and copper materials. Tolerances for sheet metal fabrication The table below summarizes the standard tolerances of the parts produced by our certified manufacturing partners.
